function.name: search_gesture_maps
function.description: Search for recorded gesture maps for an app. Check local first, then the community cloud. Use this when get_screen returns minimal content ([GESTURE_MAP_HINT]) indicating FLAG_SECURE or React Native rendering. If maps are found, use replay_gesture_map to execute one.

app_package.description: Android package name of the app, e.g. 'com.foodpanda.android'
